title: relay_log_space_limit + stopped sql_thread will stop fetching logs silently
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_db.joinit (i INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, s VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL, t TIME NOT NULL, g INT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (i)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
INSERT INTO test_db.joinit VALUES (NULL, UUID(), CURRENT_TIME(), FLOOR(1 + RAND() * 60));
INSERT INTO test_db.joinit (s, t, g) SELECT UUID(), CURRENT_TIME(), FLOOR(1 + RAND() * 60) FROM test_db.joinit WHERE g < 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_db.joinit WHERE g IS NULL OR g > 50;
key_bug_features: Stopped sql_thread prevents fetching binary logs silently
